seoTitle: New Park vs Newbold — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between New Park and Newbold. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: New Park vs Newbold: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in New Park and Newbold.
heading: New Park vs Newbold — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between New Park, New South Wales and Newbold, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Newbold has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to New Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is New Park or Newbold safer from flooding?
faq.answer: New Park has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Newbold scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: New Park scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Newbold scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in New Park or Newbold?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Newbold has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
